title: Pethelpers
description: The plugin adds a dog pet that can be summoned, leashed, and sent to find items. All pet data is saved between server restarts.
body: This plugin introduces a unique pet — a dog that players can summon, and send out to search for items located nearby (in chests or on the ground within a 20-block radius). The /pet bring command triggers a "search mode" where the dog wanders for a short while and then brings back the specified item if found. Each player can have only one pet. The pet persists through server restarts, can be teleported with the /pet tp command (with a configurable cooldown). Admins can use /pet reload to reload the plugin configuration.
